Station 5

Water Towers: New Perspectives

Context
Water Towers: New Perspectives
Result
Finalist
Competition
Water Towers: New Perspectives
Organizers
Bezalel Academy of Art and Design, Berkeley University, and the Society for Preservation of Israel Heritage Sites (SPIHS)
Year
2010
Links
ArchDaily

Station 5 is a finalist submission for the city's first water tower, built in the 1920s and situated in the town square next to municipal buildings and primary urban institutions.

Ariel Noyman

City Science Center, MIT Media Lab noyman [at] mit [dot] edu 75 Amherst Street, Cambridge, MA 02139
